song.title: O Word or God Incarnate
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Word of God incarnate, O Wisdom from on high, O Truth unchanged, unchanging, O Light of our dark sky,|| We praise Thee for the radiance That from the hallowed page, A lantern to our footsteps, Shines on from age to age.
[V2] 2) The Church from You, our Savior Received the gift divine, And still that light she lifteth O’er all the earth to shine:|| It is a golden casket Where gems of truth are stored; It is the heav’n drawn picture Of Christ, the living Word.
[V3] 3) It floateth like a banner Before God’s host unfurled; It shineth like a beacon Above the darkling world;|| It is the chart and compass That, o’er life’s surging sea, ’Mid mists and rocks and quick-sands Still guides, O Christ, to Thee.
[V4] 4) O make Thy Church, dear Savior, A lamp of burnished gold, To bear before the nations Thy true light, as of old;|| O teach Thy wand’ring pilgrims By this their path to trace, Till, clouds and darkness ended, They see Thee face to face.
song.author: William W. How
